config.video_gen.test_desc: Verify provider connectivity without generating a video.
config.video_gen.provider_desc: Select a provider configured in Provider Management. Supported types: MiniMax and Google Veo.
config.video_gen.limits_desc: Control daily usage and how long AuraGo waits for asynchronous video jobs.
config.video_gen.defaults_desc: Defaults used when the tool call does not specify clip settings.
config.video_gen.disabled_desc: Enable the toggle above to let the agent generate videos.
